before_len=55, after_len=55

[BYTE DIFFS]
0x23: 78 -> 5A
0x25: 18 -> 0A
0x27: 23 -> 0A
0x28: 00 -> 01
0x29: 78 -> 69
0x2B: 47 -> 2D
0x2D: 23 -> 14
0x2E: 00 -> 02
0x2F: 78 -> 87
0x31: 65 -> 50
0x33: 23 -> 1E
0x34: 00 -> 03
0x35: 78 -> 96

[U16LE CANDIDATES]
u16le@0x22: 30720 -> 23040 (0x7800 -> 0x5A00)
u16le@0x23: 120 -> 90 (0x0078 -> 0x005A)
u16le@0x24: 6144 -> 2560 (0x1800 -> 0x0A00)
u16le@0x25: 24 -> 10 (0x0018 -> 0x000A)
u16le@0x26: 8960 -> 2560 (0x2300 -> 0x0A00)
u16le@0x27: 35 -> 266 (0x0023 -> 0x010A)
u16le@0x28: 30720 -> 26881 (0x7800 -> 0x6901)
u16le@0x29: 120 -> 105 (0x0078 -> 0x0069)
u16le@0x2A: 18176 -> 11520 (0x4700 -> 0x2D00)
u16le@0x2B: 71 -> 45 (0x0047 -> 0x002D)
u16le@0x2C: 8960 -> 5120 (0x2300 -> 0x1400)
u16le@0x2D: 35 -> 532 (0x0023 -> 0x0214)
u16le@0x2E: 30720 -> 34562 (0x7800 -> 0x8702)
u16le@0x2F: 120 -> 135 (0x0078 -> 0x0087)
u16le@0x30: 25856 -> 20480 (0x6500 -> 0x5000)
u16le@0x31: 101 -> 80 (0x0065 -> 0x0050)
u16le@0x32: 8960 -> 7680 (0x2300 -> 0x1E00)
u16le@0x33: 35 -> 798 (0x0023 -> 0x031E)
u16le@0x34: 30720 -> 38403 (0x7800 -> 0x9603)
u16le@0x35: 120 -> 150 (0x0078 -> 0x0096)
